fileContext.overview: Manages a llama-server (llama.cpp) child process, providing a singleton instance for starting, stopping, and monitoring the server.

symbols.name: ServerManager
symbols.purpose: Singleton class for managing a llama-server child process.
symbols.behavior: Provides methods for starting, stopping, and monitoring the server, including logging and health checking.
symbols.limitations: Only one instance of the server can run at a time.

symbols.name: start
symbols.behavior: Takes a ServerOptions object as input, starts the server, and sets up logging and health checking.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the model file or llama-server binary is not found.

symbols.name: stop
symbols.behavior: Kills the server process and sets the status to stopped.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the server process is not running.

symbols.name: dispose
symbols.purpose: Disposes of the llama-server child process.
symbols.behavior: Kills the server process and clears the health timer.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the server process is not running.

symbols.name: pollHealth
symbols.purpose: Polls the health endpoint of the llama-server.
symbols.behavior: Sends a GET request to the health endpoint and updates the server status accordingly.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the server is not running or the health endpoint is not available.

symbols.name: addLog
symbols.purpose: Adds a log line to the server logs.
symbols.behavior: Pushes the log line to the internal log array and notifies all registered callbacks.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the log line is too long.

symbols.name: emit
symbols.purpose: Emits a server status update to all registered callbacks.
symbols.behavior: Updates the internal server status and notifies all registered callbacks.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the server status is not valid.

symbols.name: detectBinary
symbols.behavior: Searches for the llama-server binary in a list of possible locations.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the binary is not found.

symbols.name: commandExists
symbols.behavior: Executes a command to check if it exists and returns a promise with the result.
symbols.limitations: Fails if the command is not found.
